heritage.body: Tamil is one of the world's oldest living languages. Every word carries meaning. Every name carries identity.

footer.tagline: AI-powered Tamil naming platform for founders, creators, and ambitious builders.
footer.builtIn: Built in Tamil Nadu. Designed for the world.
philosophy.title: Why Naming Matters
philosophy.body1: Before code is written or capital is raised, naming is the first act of creation. It shapes your team's focus, defines your vision, and lays the absolute foundation of your brand identity.
philosophy.body2: In Tamil culture, a name is not just a label — it is a vessel of values, carrying thousands of years of etymological depth and historical resonance. A great name travels globally while remaining firmly rooted locally, giving your brand a distinct soul.
philosophy.quote: "A word's worth is the worth it carries forward."
features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Everything an idea needs to become a brand.
features.ai.title: AI name generation
features.ai.desc: 10 brandable names per query, tuned for global memorability and local meaning.
features.roots.title: Tamil root discovery
features.roots.desc: Every generated name is mapped to its core Tamil etymological roots with references.
features.story.title: Brand story & tagline
features.story.desc: Receive contextual taglines and narrative vibes alongside your naming options.
features.pronunciation.title: Pronunciation guide
features.pronunciation.desc: Phonetic spellings ensure founders, customers, and investors around the world can pronounce it.
features.score.title: Brand score engine
features.score.desc: Scored locally on length, simplicity, letters distribution, and phonetics ease.
features.opensource.title: Open Source
features.opensource.desc: MIT licensed naming engine. Hosted transparently and ready for community expansion.
about.title: The digital naming home for Tamil founders.
about.body.p2: Naming is the first act of building. It precedes the product, the pitch, and the press release. And yet, founders rooted in Tamil are often asked to pick between a name that means something to them and a name that travels.
about.body.p3: En Peyar exists to dissolve that tradeoff. Every name is generated from meaning, context, and linguistic roots appropriate to the selected style, with a clear pronunciation, and a tagline you can ship with — ready for a domain, a deck, or an app store listing on day one.
about.philosophy.title: Not every Tamil word is a brand.
about.philosophy.body:
A good brand name is not chosen because it is old. It is chosen because it is meaningful.

Arattai works because it describes conversation. Agaram works because it represents beginnings. Kural works because it represents concise wisdom.

En Peyar follows the same philosophy.
about.mission.title: Our mission
about.mission.p1: Tamil's vocabulary spans nature, philosophy, science, and emotion with rare precision. We believe the next generation of brands deserves names with that depth — and that founders shouldn't have to choose between heritage and reach.
about.values.title: What we value
about.values.clarity.title: Clarity over cleverness
about.values.clarity.body: A name should be pronounced right the first time. No riddles.
about.values.roots.title: Roots, not decoration
about.values.roots.body: Tamil words are chosen for meaning, not just sound.
about.values.open.title: Open by default
about.values.open.body: Prompts, scoring, translations — all readable on GitHub.
about.values.respect.title: Respect for the language
about.values.respect.body: No misused sacred words, no tokenism — only honest naming.
about.how.title: How it works
about.how.p1: You describe what you're building. We blend your keywords with a curated corpus of Tamil roots, run them through a model tuned for brand language, then score the output locally. You get ten names — each with a tagline, pronunciation guide, brand preview, and live domain check.
about.open.title: Open by design
about.open.p1: Fork it, ship it, study it, improve it. If a name generated here becomes a real company, we'd love to hear about it. Built by Kishore and open to contributions.
about.quote: "A name is the first story of a life."
about.quote.author: — Classical Naming Tradition

whytamil.title: Why Tamil?
whytamil.body: Tamil has one of the world's oldest continuous literary traditions. For centuries, words carried identity, place, values, and memory. En Peyar brings that tradition into modern naming.
whytamil.body2: Inspired by Tamil words, history, literature, and sound. Not trends.
